variants: Moza Rivera embraces the discipline of Cognitive Robotics, dedicating his expertise to understanding machine cognitive processes. He completed his doctoral studies under the guidance of mentor Ursula Hettrich, who significantly shaped his research approach. Additionally, Moza holds the Jungle Translator Accreditation, showcasing his diverse professional qualifications. The Aurora Loom Endowment stands as his primary funding source, providing essential support for his innovative projects.
